meta.title: Sell on Vergeo5 — free to list, pay only when you sell
meta.description: Join Zambia's marketplace for products, services, events, supplies, and directory listings. Free tier: 30 listings. Transparent commissions. Mobile-money payouts in minutes.

hero.headline: Free to list.
hero.subheadline: Reach buyers across Zambia with products, services, events, supplies, and your business profile — all from one vendor app.
hero.freeTierNote: Free tier includes up to 30 listings with full selling features.

products.title: Products
products.description: List on our canonical catalog — buyers compare prices across vendors.

services.title: Services
services.description: Offer beauty, catering, repairs, printing, and more with RFQ support.

events.title: Events
events.description: Sell tickets with dynamic QR check-in. Free RSVP events at 0% commission.

supplies.title: Supplies
supplies.description: Wholesale tier pricing for verified businesses (T2+).

directory.title: Directory
directory.description: Get discovered with your storefront, hours, and location on the map.

commission.heading: Transparent commissions
commission.intro: Rates are shown before you publish each listing. You only pay when you make a sale.
commission.footnote: Rates may be reviewed quarterly. Free events stay at 0% forever.

signup.title: Sign up in minutes
signup.description: Create your vendor account on mobile or desktop — no upfront fees.

kyc.title: Verify with T1 KYC
kyc.description: Upload your NRC and a selfie. We match your mobile-money name. Same-day approval.

list.title: List your first products
list.description: Attach to our catalog or quick-list. See your commission before you publish.

sell.title: Sell and get paid
sell.description: Orders flow to your dashboard. Escrow protects buyers; payouts hit your MoMo fast.

kyc.heading: Verification tiers
kyc.intro: No unverified listings go public. Start at T1 and upgrade as you grow.

t1.title: Same-day selling
t1.description: NRC photo + selfie + mobile-money name match. Up to 30 listings; first 5 orders capped at K500 each.

t2.title: Lift your caps
t2.description: PACRA certificate + company TPIN. Verified badge, supplies tab, and higher limits.

t3.title: Invited partners
t3.description: API access and banner placement eligibility for high-volume sellers.

preferred.title: Earned trust badge
preferred.description: ≥20 orders, ≥4.5★ rating, <2% disputes, <5% cancellations — reviewed monthly.

payout.heading: Fast mobile-money payouts
payout.promise: Paid out in minutes on mobile money — always within 48 hours.
payout.body: Buyer payments are held in escrow until delivery is confirmed (or auto-confirmed after 48 hours). Once released, MTN and Airtel payouts typically arrive in under five minutes. Bank transfers take 24–36 hours.

fees.question: Are there monthly fees?
fees.answer: No. Vergeo5 is free to list at launch. You pay a commission only when you sell. The free tier includes up to 30 listings.

payout.question: When do I get paid?
payout.answer: After escrow releases on delivery confirmation. Mobile-money payouts usually arrive in minutes; we guarantee payout within 48 hours.

whatCanISell.question: What can I sell?
whatCanISell.answer: Products, services, event tickets, wholesale supplies, and directory listings across our launch categories — groceries, beauty, fashion, electronics, home goods, and more. Prohibited items (used phones, alcohol, pharma, etc.) are blocked.

kyc.question: How long does verification take?
kyc.answer: T1 sellers with a valid NRC, selfie, and matching MoMo name are typically approved the same day. Nothing goes live until you pass KYC.

cta.heading: Ready to reach buyers across Zambia?
cta.body: Join hundreds of vendors building on Vergeo5. Set up your store in under ten minutes.

meta.title: Vendor onboarding — Vergeo5
meta.description: Complete your business profile and T1 KYC to start selling on Vergeo5.

business.heading: Business basics
business.intro: Tell buyers who you are. You can edit this later in your profile.

kyc.heading: T1 verification
kyc.intro: Upload your NRC and a selfie. We match your mobile-money name. Nothing goes public until approved.
kyc.nrcHelp: Capture the front of your National Registration Card in good light.
kyc.selfieHelp: Hold your phone at eye level. Face the camera directly.
kyc.momoHelp: MTN or Airtel number registered in your name for payouts.
kyc.uploadFailed: Upload failed. Check your connection and try again.

quality.heading: Photo tips
quality.light: Use daylight or a bright room — avoid glare on the NRC.
quality.steady: Hold still; blurry photos are rejected.
quality.frame: Fill the frame — all four corners of the NRC visible.
quality.face: Remove hats and sunglasses for the selfie.

review.heading: Review and submit
review.intro: Check your details. After submission, our team reviews within one business day.
review.gateNotice: Your listings stay hidden until KYC is approved.

pending.title: Under review
pending.body: We are verifying your documents. You will get a WhatsApp update when done.

approved.title: You are verified
approved.body: T1 KYC approved. You can create listings — buyers will see them once you publish.

rejected.title: Verification needs changes
rejected.body: We could not approve your application.
rejected.gateNotice: Listings remain hidden until you pass verification.

resubmit.title: Resubmit documents
resubmit.body: Update the items below and resubmit — you do not need to start over.

t2.stubBody: PACRA certificate and company TPIN — coming soon.

errors.invalidPhone: Enter a valid Zambian mobile number
errors.loadFailed: Could not load your application. Pull to refresh.
